instruction: Are the following functions invertible? 1. $f(x)$ is the volume of $x$ kg of water at 4 degrees C. Is this invertible? [ANS] 2. $f(t)$ is the total accumulated rainfall in inches $t$ minutes into a sudden rainstorm in July, 2005. Is this invertible? [ANS] 3. $f(w)$ is the cost of mailing a letter weighing $w$ grams. Is this invertible? [ANS]
